_doc: Werewolf gifts. Each entry sets requires_werewolf=true so non-Garou never see them in get_available_spells. requires_skill points at the primal_urge skill; skill_required encodes rank (1, 2, 3). Gifts cost mana — the pool the status screen relabels 'Gnosis' for werewolves — so gift use and any class magic compete for the same well. requires_tribe limits a gift to tribes that traditionally hold it; empty array means any Garou with the rank can use it.

razor_claws.name: Razor Claws
razor_claws.description: You drag your claws across stone or steel and they come away honed to a killing edge. Every blow lands heavier while the gift holds.

wolf_hide.name: Wolf Hide
wolf_hide.description: Your skin thickens into something between fur and old leather. Blades skid where they should bite.

sense_prey.name: Sense Prey
sense_prey.description: The world resolves into scent-trails and heartbeats. Nothing hides from the hunter — not even what cannot be seen.

rending_fury.name: Rending Fury
rending_fury.description: A blur of claws too fast to follow. The spirit of the storm lends its speed and the target wears the consequences.

terrifying_howl.name: Terrifying Howl
terrifying_howl.description: A howl with the whole Umbra behind it. Knees buckle; hands shake; the prey moves like it is wading through deep water.
